title: fix(quest): drop post-merge miss-comment from payout resolver
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Drop the post-merge \"no quest linked\" fallback ping from #10948.
- Revert workflow's \`pull-requests: write\` back to \`read\` (no longer needed).

## Why
Codex review on #10948 flagged it: the ping fires on every non-quest merge (it fired on #10948 itself). Post-merge nag is also closing the barn door after the horse — payout is gone, idempotency means no replay.

Prevention belongs pre-merge in the maintainer triage habit (glance at PR sidebar, click \"Link an issue\" if missing). Recovery stays the manual back-fill we just used for CloudCompile/#10920. Keeps everything simple.

## Test plan
- [x] Resolver still returns the linked quest when `Fixes #N` or sidebar link is present.
- [x] On miss, workflow ends green like it did before #10948.
- [x] \`npx biome check\` clean.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Quiet in the hive
gist.blurb: We've silenced an overeager bot that was pinging on every single merged PR. Peace and quiet has been restored to the repository.
gist.summary: Removed an overly aggressive post-merge fallback comment from the quest payout resolver and reverted the workflow's write permissions.
gist.impact: Maintainers will no longer receive unnecessary 'no quest linked' pings on non-quest PR merges.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee silencing a noisy alarm or terminal, representing the removal of the annoying post-merge bot ping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny earmuffs and gently pressing a 'mute' button on a retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
